a.xlink:title: Aggregates all robot subsystems and drives the main control loop.
Polymorphic interface for a robot subsystem.
Rack-and-pinion block shooter controlled by encoder feedback.
Newline-delimited ASCII command receiver for Arduino-to-Arduino comms.
Quadrature encoder driver with velocity and acceleration estimation.
Full-featured PID controller with anti-windup, output filtering, and optional nonlinear extensions.
Sharp GP2Y0A51 analog IR distance sensor driver.
Tracks robot pose by integrating encoder wheel displacements.
Servo driver with angle clamping, inversion, and deferred writes.
Drives an ordered sequence of AutoStep objects to completion.
Pure-virtual base class for all autonomous steps.
